about.subtitle: Faculty of Computers and Information - Assiut National University

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: The faculty seeks to achieve excellence and innovation in education, scientific research, and community service locally and regionally, to be a leading center in the field of computers and information.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Providing students with knowledge and scientific research in computer science and information systems and technology, and developing curricula in line with scientific development and labor market needs.

graduates.description: Preparing specialized graduates capable of competing locally and globally

admissions.title: Admissions and Registration
admissions.subtitle: Comprehensive information about admission requirements and registration procedures at the Faculty of Computers and Information
notes: Admission is according to the coordination office rules announced annually
All required documents must be submitted on time
Priority for students with highest grades
admissions.stepsSubtitle: Follow these steps to complete the registration process successfully

step1.title: Online Application
step1.description: Fill out the application form via the coordination office website

step2.title: Submit Documents
step2.description: Submit original documents to the faculty on specified dates

step3.title: Medical Examination
step3.description: Undergo medical examination at the approved center

step4.title: Pay Fees
step4.description: Pay tuition fees and obtain receipt

semester.title: Semester Fees
semester.description: Paid at the beginning of each semester

fees.note: Fees are subject to change according to university decisions

faq.question: Can I transfer from another faculty?
faq.answer: Yes, transfer is possible according to the rules governing transfer between faculties and universities

faq.question: What is the language of instruction?
faq.answer: Study is in both Arabic and English depending on the nature of the course

faq.question: Are there scholarships?
faq.answer: Yes, the university offers scholarships to outstanding students according to specific conditions

faq.question: How is the specialization chosen?
faq.answer: Specialization is chosen at the end of the first year based on student preference and cumulative GPA

departments.title: Academic Departments
departments.subtitle: Three specialized academic departments covering all fields of computers and information
departments.overviewSubtitle: The faculty includes three specialized academic departments, each offering a distinguished bachelor's program

cs.description: The Computer Science department focuses on the theoretical and applied foundations of computer science, aiming to prepare graduates capable of developing innovative software solutions and conducting advanced scientific research.

se.description: The Software Engineering department focuses on modern methodologies and tools for software development, aiming to prepare engineers capable of building high-quality software systems.

ai.description: The Artificial Intelligence department specializes in AI and machine learning technologies, aiming to prepare specialists capable of developing innovative intelligent systems.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of use for the Faculty of Computers and Information website and system

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to the Faculty of Computers and Information website - Assiut National University. By using this website and student management system, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions.

usage.title: Terms of Use
items: The system must be used for academic purposes only
Sharing login credentials with others is prohibited
Attempting to hack the system or unauthorized access is prohibited

account.title: User Account
items: Each student is responsible for their personal account
Personal data must be updated when changed
In case of password loss, contact technical support
The university is not responsible for any unauthorized use of the account

privacy.title: Privacy
items: We respect the privacy of your personal data
We will not share your data with third parties without your permission
We use your data for academic and administrative purposes only
You can view the full privacy policy

conduct.title: Code of Conduct
items: All users and staff must be respected
Posting offensive or inappropriate content is prohibited
Using the system for commercial purposes is prohibited
Intellectual property rules must be followed

liability.title: Disclaimer
items: The university is not responsible for any errors in user-entered data
Service may be temporarily suspended for maintenance
The university is not responsible for data loss due to technical problems
Users should keep backups of their important data

changes.title: Amendments
changes.content: The university reserves the right to modify these terms and conditions at any time. Users will be notified of any material changes.

terms.contactNote: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.subtitle: Browse all website pages and sections
sitemap.description: The sitemap helps you easily navigate between all pages and sections of the Faculty of Computers and Information website. You can quickly access any page through the links below.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we protect your personal data
privacy.intro: At the Faculty of Computers and Information, we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

usage.title: Information Usage
items: Communicating with you about academic matters

regulations.title: Academic Regulations
regulations.subtitle: Faculty academic regulations and systems
regulations.description: Learn about the academic regulations governing studies at the Faculty of Computers and Information
regulations.overviewText: This page contains the approved academic regulations for studying at the Faculty of Computers and Information. You can download the regulation for your specialization to view all details and rules governing the study.
notes: All students must comply with the approved academic regulations
Regulations are subject to updates - please review the latest version periodically
For any inquiries, please contact Student Affairs
It is recommended to print a copy of the regulations for reference when needed

faq.q: Can I download the regulations on my phone?
faq.a: Yes, the files are in PDF format and can be downloaded and viewed on any device

faq.q: What is the difference between general regulations and software engineering regulations?
faq.a: General regulations cover all specializations, while software engineering regulations are specific to the Software Engineering program only

faq.q: Are regulations mandatory for all students?
faq.a: Yes, all students are required to comply with the approved academic regulations

faq.q: How do I know which regulations apply to me?
faq.a: Regulations are applied according to your enrollment year. Consult your academic advisor to confirm

regulations.inquirySubtitle: Contact Student Affairs for more information
